description: Sample Node.js input for testing code analyzer

simple.name: Basic Function
simple.code: function add(a, b) { return a + b; }

simple.name: Function Expression
simple.code: const divide = function(a, b) { return a / b; };

simple.name: Async Function
simple.code: async function fetchData() { const response = await fetch('/api/data'); return response.json(); }

classes.name: Simple Class
classes.code: class Calculator { add(a, b) { return a + b; } subtract(a, b) { return a - b; } }

classes.name: Class with Constructor
classes.code: class Person { constructor(name, age) { this.name = name; this.age = age; } greet() { return `Hello, my name is ${this.name}`; } }

classes.name: Class with Static Methods
classes.code: class MathUtils { static sum(...numbers) { return numbers.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0); } static multiply(...numbers) { return numbers.reduce((a, b) => a * b, 1); } }

classes.name: Class with Getters/Setters
classes.code: class Temperature { constructor(celsius) { this._celsius = celsius; } get fahrenheit() { return this._celsius * 9/5 + 32; } set fahrenheit(value) { this._celsius = (value - 32) * 5/9; } }

classes.name: Class extending another
classes.code: class Animal { constructor(name) { this.name = name; } speak() { return `${this.name} makes a sound`; } } class Dog extends Animal { speak() { return `${this.name} barks`; } }

modules.name: CommonJS Export
modules.code: module.exports = { add, subtract }; function add(a, b) { return a + b; } function subtract(a, b) { return a - b; }

modules.name: ES6 Export
modules.code: export const PI = 3.14159; export function circleArea(radius) { return PI * radius * radius; }

modules.name: Mixed Exports
modules.code: export default class Logger { log(message) { console.log(message); } } export const DEBUG = true;

modules.name: Import Statements
modules.code: import fs from 'fs'; import { join, resolve } from 'path'; import * as utils from './utils.js';

modules.name: Require Imports
modules.code: const express = require('express'); const { body, validationResult } = require('express-validator');

async.name: Promise Creation
async.code: const promise = new Promise((resolve, reject) => { setTimeout(() => resolve('done'), 1000); });

async.name: Async/Await
async.code: async function getUser(id) { try { const response = await fetch(`/api/users/${id}`); return await response.json(); } catch (err) { console.error('Failed to fetch user:', err); } }

async.name: Promise.all
async.code: const [users, posts] = await Promise.all([ fetch('/api/users'), fetch('/api/posts') ]);

async.name: Promise.race
async.code: const result = await Promise.race([ fetch('/api/data'), new Promise((_, reject) => setTimeout(() => reject(new Error('timeout')), 5000)) ]);

errors.name: Try/Catch
errors.code: try { JSON.parse(invalidJson); } catch (err) { console.error('Parse error:', err.message); }

errors.name: Custom Error Class
errors.code: class ValidationError extends Error { constructor(message, field) { super(message); this.name = 'ValidationError'; this.field = field; } } throw new ValidationError('Invalid email', 'email');

errors.name: Error Handling with Callbacks
errors.code: function readFile(path, callback) { fs.readFile(path, 'utf8', (err, data) => { if (err) { callback(err); return; } callback(null, data); }); }

data_structures.name: Array Operations
data_structures.code: const numbers = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]; const doubled = numbers.map(n => n * 2); const evens = numbers.filter(n => n % 2 === 0); const sum = numbers.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0);

data_structures.name: Object Manipulation
data_structures.code: const user = { name: 'Alice', age: 30 }; const keys = Object.keys(user); const values = Object.values(user); const entries = Object.entries(user);

data_structures.name: Map Usage
data_structures.code: const map = new Map(); map.set('key', 'value'); map.set(42, 'answer'); map.set({ id: 1 }, 'object key');

data_structures.name: Set Usage
data_structures.code: const set = new Set([1, 2, 3, 3, 4]); set.add(5); set.delete(2); const has = set.has(3);

data_structures.name: WeakMap/WeakSet
data_structures.code: const weakMap = new WeakMap(); let obj = {}; weakMap.set(obj, 'metadata'); const weakSet = new WeakSet(); weakSet.add(obj);

control_flow.name: Conditionals
control_flow.code: if (x > 0) { return 'positive'; } else if (x < 0) { return 'negative'; } else { return 'zero'; }

control_flow.name: Switch Statement
control_flow.code: switch (status) { case 200: return 'OK'; case 404: return 'Not Found'; case 500: return 'Error'; default: return 'Unknown'; }

control_flow.name: Loops
control_flow.code: for (let i = 0; i < 10; i++) { console.log(i); } for (const item of items) { process(item); } for (const key in object) { console.log(key, object[key]); }

control_flow.name: While Loop
control_flow.code: let i = 0; while (i < 10) { console.log(i); i++; } do { console.log(i); i++; } while (i < 5);

advanced.name: Closures
advanced.code: function createCounter() { let count = 0; return { increment: () => ++count, decrement: () => --count, getCount: () => count }; }

advanced.name: Currying
advanced.code: const curry = (fn) => (a) => (b) => fn(a, b); const curriedAdd = curry((a, b) => a + b); const add5 = curriedAdd(5);

advanced.name: Decorator Pattern
advanced.code: function log(target, name, descriptor) { const original = descriptor.value; descriptor.value = function(...args) { console.log(`Calling ${name} with`, args); return original.apply(this, args); }; return descriptor; }

advanced.name: Proxy
advanced.code: const handler = { get: (obj, prop) => prop in obj ? obj[prop] : 'default' }; const proxy = new Proxy({}, handler);

advanced.name: Generator Functions
advanced.code: function* idGenerator() { let id = 1; while (true) { yield id++; } } const gen = idGenerator(); gen.next().value;

event_handling.name: EventEmitter
event_handling.code: const EventEmitter = require('events'); class MyEmitter extends EventEmitter {} const myEmitter = new MyEmitter(); myEmitter.on('event', () => { console.log('event fired'); }); myEmitter.emit('event');

streams.name: Readable Stream
streams.code: const readable = fs.createReadStream('file.txt', 'utf8'); readable.on('data', chunk => console.log(chunk)); readable.on('end', () => console.log('done'));

streams.name: Writable Stream
streams.code: const writable = fs.createWriteStream('output.txt'); writable.write('Hello'); writable.write('World'); writable.end();

streams.name: Transform Stream
streams.code: const { Transform } = require('stream'); const upperCase = new Transform({ transform(chunk, encoding, callback) { this.push(chunk.toString().toUpperCase()); callback(); } });

streams.name: Pipeline
streams.code: const { pipeline } = require('stream/promises'); await pipeline(readable, transform, writable);

http.name: HTTP Server
http.code: const http = require('http'); const server = http.createServer((req, res) => { res.writeHead(200); res.end('Hello World'); }); server.listen(3000);

http.name: Express App
http.code: const express = require('express'); const app = express(); app.get('/users', (req, res) => { res.json([{ id: 1, name: 'Alice' }]); }); app.listen(3000);

http.name: Middleware
http.code: app.use(express.json()); app.use((req, res, next) => { console.log(`${req.method} ${req.url}`); next(); });

http.name: Route Parameters
http.code: app.get('/users/:id', (req, res) => { const id = req.params.id; res.json({ id, name: 'User' }); });

testing.name: Jest Test
testing.code: describe('Calculator', () => { test('adds numbers', () => { expect(add(2, 3)).toBe(5); }); test('subtracts numbers', () => { expect(subtract(10, 4)).toBe(6); }); });

testing.name: Mock Function
testing.code: const mockFn = jest.fn(); mockFn.mockReturnValue(42); expect(mockFn()).toBe(42); expect(mockFn).toHaveBeenCalled();

testing.name: Spy
testing.code: const spy = jest.spyOn(console, 'log'); console.log('test'); expect(spy).toHaveBeenCalledWith('test'); spy.mockRestore();

testing.name: Async Test
testing.code: test('async test', async () => { const data = await fetchData(); expect(data).toBeDefined(); });

edge_cases.name: Unicode in Code
edge_cases.code: function café() { return 'résumé'; } const 世界 = 'hello';

edge_cases.name: Emoji in Comments

typescript.name: Type Annotations
typescript.code: function greet(name: string, age: number): string { return `Hello ${name}, you are ${age} years old`; }

typescript.name: Interface
typescript.code: interface User { id: number; name: string; email?: string; readonly createdAt: Date; }

typescript.name: Type Alias
typescript.code: type ID = string | number; type Callback<T> = (data: T) => void;

typescript.name: Generic Function
typescript.code: function identity<T>(arg: T): T { return arg; }

typescript.name: Generic Class
typescript.code: class Box<T> { private content: T; constructor(content: T) { this.content = content; } get(): T { return this.content; } set(content: T) { this.content = content; } }

typescript.name: Union Types
typescript.code: type Result<T> = { success: true; data: T } | { success: false; error: string };
